summary: Solid soundboard recording (with a tiny Wheel glitch) captures an energetic second set highlighted by Touch of Gray, Space and The Other One.
review: The SBD source is generally clear and pleasant, though listeners note a six‑second drop in the middle of The Wheel. Musically the show is a mixed bag – the band hits high energy peaks on Touch of Gray, Space and The Other One, but the second run through Dear Mr. Fantasy suffers from off‑key vocals and shaky arrangement.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the recording quality and several standout songs, but recurring criticism of Dear Mr. Fantasy and a minor tape glitch lower the overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice sounding board mix; a brief cut/skip noted in The Wheel, otherwise clear and balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set only release; the band carries a spark from the previous night, delivering high‑energy peaks despite a stumble on Dear Mr. Fantasy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mixed feedback – Garcia’s vocal lead on Dear Mr. Fantasy is described as off‑key and the guitar break mediocre, though later sections receive praise for his playing.
